glosses.en: as long as; so long as

sentences.target: Ich lese solange und warte auf dich.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈleːzə zoˈlaŋə ʊnt ˈvaʁtə aʊ̯f dɪç/

translations.de: Ich lese solange und warte auf dich.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈleːzə zoˈlaŋə ʊnt ˈvaʁtə aʊ̯f dɪç/
translations.en: I'll read for now and wait for you.
translations.es: Mientras tanto, voy a leer y esperarte.
translations.fr: En attendant, je vais lire et t'attendre.
translations.it: Nel frattempo leggo e ti aspetto.
translations.ru: Я пока почитаю и подожду тебя.
translations.pt: Enquanto isso, vou ler e te esperar.
translations.tr: Bu arada biraz okuyup seni bekleyeceğim.
translations.vi: Trong lúc này mình sẽ đọc sách và đợi bạn.
translations.nl: Ik lees intussen even en wacht op je.
translations.uk: Поки що я почитаю і почекаю на тебе.
translations.hi: मैं तब तक पढ़ूँगा और तुम्हारा इंतज़ार करूँगा.
translations.pl: Póki co poczytam i poczekam na ciebie.
translations.el: Στο μεταξύ θα διαβάσω και θα σε περιμένω.
translations.nb: I mellomtiden leser jeg og venter på deg.
translations.id: Untuk sementara aku akan membaca sambil menunggumu.
translations.sv: Jag läser så länge och väntar på dig.
translations.ro: Între timp, o să citesc și o să te aștept.
translations.cs: Zatím si budu číst a počkám na tebe.
translations.da: Imens læser jeg og venter på dig.
translations.fi: Sillä välin luen ja odotan sinua.
translations.ja: その間は本を読んで待ってるね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (present, 1st singular) of the first clause.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘for the time being/for so long’ modifying the situation.
Coordinating conjunction linking two coordinated clauses/predicates.
Finite main verb (present, 1st singular) of the second coordinated clause.
Preposition governing accusative; part of the fixed prepositional complement ‘auf + Akk’ with ‘warten’.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular accusative; object of the preposition ‘auf’.

sentences.target: Sie spielt solange mit dem Hund.

translations.de: Sie spielt solange mit dem Hund.
translations.en: She's playing with the dog for now.
translations.es: Por ahora, está jugando con el perro.
translations.fr: Pour l’instant, elle joue avec le chien.
translations.it: Per il momento sta giocando con il cane.
translations.pt: Por enquanto, ela está brincando com o cachorro.
translations.vi: Hiện tại cô ấy đang chơi với con chó.
translations.ar: في الوقت الحالي هي تلعب مع الكلب.
translations.nl: Voorlopig speelt ze met de hond.
translations.uk: Поки що вона грається з собакою.
translations.hi: अभी के लिए वह कुत्ते के साथ खेल रही है.
translations.pl: Na razie bawi się z psem.
translations.el: Προς το παρόν παίζει με τον σκύλο.
translations.id: Untuk sementara dia bermain dengan anjing.
translations.sv: För tillfället leker hon med hunden.
translations.ja: 今は犬と遊んでいるよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd singular).
Temporal adverb meaning ‘for the time being/for so long’ modifying the action.
Preposition governing dative.
Definite article, dative masculine singular required by ‘mit’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘mit’ (dative).

sentences.target: Wir halten solange einen Platz für dich frei.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaltən zoˈlaŋə ˈaɪ̯nən plats fyːɐ̯ dɪç fʁaɪ̯/

translations.de: Wir halten solange einen Platz für dich frei.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaltən zoˈlaŋə ˈaɪ̯nən plats fyːɐ̯ dɪç fʁaɪ̯/
translations.en: We'll keep a seat for you for now.
translations.es: Por ahora te guardamos un asiento.
translations.fr: Pour l’instant, on te garde une place.
translations.it: Per il momento ti teniamo un posto.
translations.pt: Por enquanto, vamos guardar um lugar para você.
translations.vi: Tạm thời bọn mình sẽ giữ chỗ cho bạn.
translations.ar: في الوقت الحالي سنحجز لك مقعدًا.
translations.nl: Voorlopig houden we een plek voor je vrij.
translations.uk: Поки що ми тримаємо для тебе місце.
translations.hi: अभी के लिए हम तुम्हारे लिए एक सीट रोककर रखेंगे.
translations.pl: Na razie trzymamy dla ciebie miejsce.
translations.el: Προς το παρόν σου κρατάμε μια θέση.
translations.nb: Foreløpig holder vi av en plass til deg.
translations.id: Untuk sementara kami akan menyisakan satu kursi untukmu.
translations.sv: Så länge sparar vi en plats åt dig.
translations.da: Foreløbig holder vi en plads til dig.
translations.ja: とりあえず席を取っておくね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 1st plural); part of the separable verb ‘freihalten’ split in main clause.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘for the time being/for so long’ modifying the verb phrase.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular for the direct object ‘Platz’.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of ‘halten’.
Preposition governing accusative, introducing a beneficiary.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular accusative; object of ‘für’.
Separable verb particle forming ‘freihalten’ with ‘halten’.

sentences.target: Du hältst solange die Tasche fest.

translations.de: Du hältst solange die Tasche fest.
translations.en: You hold the bag for now.
translations.it: Per il momento, tieni la borsa.
translations.vi: Tạm thời cầm chặt cái túi nhé.
translations.nl: Houd de tas voorlopig goed vast.
translations.hi: अभी के लिए बैग को मजबूती से पकड़े रहो.
translations.el: Προς το παρόν κράτα καλά την τσάντα.
translations.nb: Hold godt fast i vesken foreløpig.
translations.id: Untuk sementara pegang tas itu erat-erat.
translations.sv: Håll i väskan ordentligt så länge.
translations.da: Hold godt fast i tasken foreløbig.
translations.ja: とりあえずカバンをしっかり持ってて。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 2nd singular); part of the separable verb ‘festhalten’ split in main clause.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘for the time being/for so long’ modifying the verb phrase.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular with the direct object ‘Tasche’.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of ‘hältst’.
Separable verb particle forming ‘festhalten’ with ‘hältst’.

app_payload.word_en: as long as; so long as
jp: Ich lese solange und warte auf dich.
Sie spielt solange mit dem Hund.
Wir halten solange einen Platz für dich frei.
Du hältst solange die Tasche fest.

We'll keep a seat for you for now.
You hold the bag for now.
